description: A farm manager needs to ensure all employees have completed their annual safety training.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve a list of all current employees.
Check the training records for each employee to see if they have completed the 'Annual Safety' course.

expected_outcome.value: Agent checks the records against the employee list.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all employees who have not yet completed the training.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a list of non-compliant employees.

nodes.task_description: Send a reminder notification to the non-compliant employees and their supervisor.
